data.title: Resurs Holding Announces Board Changes and Remuneration Decisions
data.description:
Resurs Holding AB ( (SE:RESURS) ) has issued an announcement.

Resurs Holding AB held an Extraordinary General Meeting where it was resolved to elect Steve Krieger as a new Board member, replacing Peter, while maintaining the Board’s size at eight members. The meeting also decided that remuneration for Board and committee work would remain unchanged, with no remuneration for certain Board members until the next Annual General Meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:RESURS) stock is a Hold with a SEK29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Resurs Holding AB stock, see the SE:RESURS Stock Forecast page.

More about Resurs Holding AB

Resurs Holding, operating through its subsidiary Resurs Bank, is a leader in retail finance across the Nordic region, providing payment solutions, consumer loans, and niche insurance products. Established in 1977, it has become a key partner for retail and e-commerce payment and loyalty solutions, serving approximately six million private customers in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland. The company is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm and operates under the supervision of Finansinspektionen.

Average Trading Volume: 21,611

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK5.42B

data.title: Park Ha Biological Technology Announces 2025 AGM with Key Share Structure Proposals
data.description:
Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd. ( (PHH) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 12, 2025, Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd. announced its upcoming 2025 Annual General Meeting, scheduled for October 3, 2025. Key proposals include increasing the company’s share capital, introducing a dual-class share structure, and approving a share consolidation. The meeting will also address the appointment of WWC P.C. as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending October 31, 2025. These changes aim to enhance the company’s capital structure and governance, potentially impacting shareholder voting power and market positioning.

More about Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd.

Park Ha Biological Technology Co., Ltd., incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PHH, operates within the biological technology industry. The company is based in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province, China, and focuses on life sciences innovation.

Average Trading Volume: 1,831,496

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.title: Powermax Minerals Secures $2.98 Million in Private Placement Offerings
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Powermax Minerals, Inc. ( (TSE:PMAX) ).

Powermax Minerals Inc. has successfully closed two non-brokered private placement offerings, raising a total of approximately $2.98 million. The proceeds from these offerings will be used to fund exploration work on their REE properties in Canada and for general working capital purposes. This strategic financial move is expected to bolster Powermax’s exploration capabilities and strengthen its position in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Powermax Minerals, Inc.

Powermax Minerals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company with options to acquire the Cameron and Atikokan rare-earth element (REE) properties located in British Columbia and Ontario, respectively.

Average Trading Volume: 24,976

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Copper Fox Metals Unveils New Copper Target at Mineral Mountain
data.description:
Copper Fox Metals ( (TSE:CUU) ) has issued an update.

Copper Fox Metals has identified a new porphyry copper target at its Mineral Mountain project in Arizona, expanding the potential of the district. The discovery includes a large area of copper and molybdenum mineralization, enhancing the project’s prospects and positioning it as a significant player in the porphyry copper industry. The company plans further exploration activities such as mapping, geochemistry, and petrographic studies to evaluate the target’s potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CUU) stock is a Buy with a C$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Copper Fox Metals stock, see the TSE:CUU Stock Forecast page.

Copper Fox Metals Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of porphyry copper projects. The company, along with its subsidiary Desert Fox Mineral Mountain Co., is involved in identifying and expanding copper targets in Arizona, particularly in the Mineral Mountain Mining District.

data.title: JY Gas Limited Announces Change of Registered Office
data.description:
JY Gas Ltd. ( (HK:1407) ) has provided an announcement.

JY Gas Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, has announced a change in its registered office and principal share registrar and transfer office, effective from April 1, 2025. data.title: Nexmetals Mining Reports Promising Selkirk Drilling Results
data.description:
An announcement from Nexmetals Mining ( (TSE:NEXM) ) is now available.

On September 18, 2025, NexMetals Mining Corp. announced the results of its metallurgical drilling program at the Selkirk Mine in Botswana. The results from two of the twelve drill holes revealed significant mineralization, with one hole showing 201.30 meters of 0.91% copper equivalent and another 85.00 meters of 0.98% copper equivalent. These findings underscore the potential for expansion and open-pit development at the Selkirk deposit, as mineralization was found both above the current Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) and within the conceptual pit shell. The results are expected to aid in metallurgical optimization and resource growth, enhancing the company’s operational prospects and industry positioning.

More about Nexmetals Mining

NexMetals Mining Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the extraction and processing of copper, nickel, cobalt, and platinum group elements. The company is actively involved in the development of the Selkirk Mine in Botswana, which is a past-producing site known for its rich deposits of these minerals.

Average Trading Volume: 101,778

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$168.2M

data.title: Commercial Metals Acquires Concrete Pipe & Precast
data.description:
Commercial Metals Company ( (CMC) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 17, 2025, Commercial Metals Company announced its agreement to acquire Concrete Pipe & Precast, LLC for $675 million, aiming to expand its commercial portfolio in early-stage construction solutions. This acquisition is expected to enhance CMC’s financial profile, being immediately accretive to earnings per share and free cash flow per share, while establishing a scalable growth platform in the precast concrete industry, which is projected to outpace the broader concrete sector.

data.title: Jubilee Industries Announces Board Changes Following Director Retirements
data.description:
Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:NHD) ) has shared an update.

Jubilee Industries Holdings Ltd. announced the retirement of three independent directors, Mr. Cheong Keng Chuan, Mr. Ng Siew Hoong, and Mr. Toh Kim Teck, due to reaching the maximum nine-year term of service as stipulated by the Catalist Rules. These retirements will take effect at the conclusion of the company’s annual general meeting for the financial year ending March 2025. The company expressed gratitude for their contributions and outlined the subsequent changes in the composition of the board and its committees.

data.title: RUSAL’s Bonds Gain Moscow Exchange Listing, Enhancing Market Presence
data.description:
United Co RUSAL ( (HK:0486) ) has provided an announcement.

United Company RUSAL has announced that its exchange-traded bonds have been included in the ‘Second level’ section of the Moscow Exchange’s list of securities admitted to trading. This inclusion, effective September 17, 2025, allows the bonds to be traded on the exchange, potentially enhancing the company’s financial flexibility and market presence. The bonds, denominated in Chinese yuan, are part of the BO-001P-15 series and are set to mature 540 days from their placement commencement date. This strategic move could impact RUSAL’s operations by broadening its investor base and strengthening its financial position.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company incorporated under the laws of Jersey and continued in the Russian Federation. It operates in the metals industry, primarily focusing on the production and sale of aluminum and related products. The company is listed on the Moscow Exchange and the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, indicating its significant presence in both Russian and international markets.

Learn more about 0486 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
